title: Visit Of The Fon Of Guneku To North America
excerpt: Guneku Indegenes under the canopy of its cultural association (GUDECA-US CHAPTER) are mobilizing to welcome HRH Fon Fomuki in the US this summer.
body:
Guneku Indegenes under the canopy of its cultural association (GUDECA-US CHAPTER) are mobilizing to welcome HRH Fon Fomuki in the US this summer.
